MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-22-2024 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-09-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: DEFENDANT MONSANTO COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Off calendar per transfer order filed July 16, 2024.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy Malone. (302/RCE)

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT MONSANTO COMPANY's MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Anastasia Olano, Esq., of DORDICK LAW CORPORATION, (310) 551-0949, for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not Argued/Contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant's unopposed "motion to change trial venue to Riverside County" is granted. Defendant shall pay the transfer fee.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: R. Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed. See scanned order for complete ruling.
